name: Qobuzarr
author: RicherTunes
description: Educational/personal use only. High-quality music indexer and download client for Qobuz streaming service with ML optimization - built upon TrevTV's Lidarr.Plugin.Qobuz foundation. Users must comply with local laws and Qobuz Terms of Service.
disclaimer: This plugin is provided AS-IS for educational purposes. Users are solely responsible for legal compliance in their jurisdiction. The authors assume no liability for misuse.
